description_long: This is a plush stuffed bear with a soft, cream-colored body and a round head featuring embroidered brown eyes, eyebrows, and a small black nose. The bear is dressed in a fluffy, light tan and white hooded jacket that adds texture and visual interest to its appearance. Its ears are small and rounded, positioned symmetrically on top of its head, and its limbs are short and slightly rounded, giving it a cuddly and approachable look. The stitching is neat and the facial features are simple yet expressive, conveying a gentle and friendly demeanor. The bear's jacket has a faux-fur trim around the hood, enhancing its cozy and warm aesthetic. The overall construction appears soft and squeezable, typical of a high-quality stuffed toy designed for comfort and companionship.
description: A soft, cream-colored stuffed bear wearing a fluffy tan and white hooded jacket, with simple embroidered facial features and a cuddly, plush body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bear's profile, rounded ear, and the fluffy texture of the hooded jacket.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the bear's head, both ears, and the full hooded jacket with its textured trim.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bear's other profile, ear, and the plush jacket's side details.
description_view_3: Front view showing the bear's face with embroidered eyes, nose, and eyebrows, as well as the front of the fluffy jacket.
attribute_facial_expression: The bear has a neutral, gentle facial expression with simple embroidered eyes, slightly arched eyebrows, and a small, rounded nose. The features give it a calm and friendly appearance.
attribute_clothing_or_accessories: fluffy tan and white hooded jacket
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms slightly forward and legs extended in front, head facing forward.
